candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue total; preferred consolidated revenue line over individual revenue components like Rental income or Income from development properties.
Revenue component, but not full top-line because Total Revenue also includes other income/development property income.
Revenue component for some years, but not the full top line.

variables.notes: Using the explicit total revenue line as the priority revenue label.

candidates.why: Explicit cost of revenues total; best match for COGS/cost of sales. Includes property/development direct costs.
Direct operating cost component, but incomplete in years with development property expenses.

candidates.row_label: Ground leases/Rental Expenses in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Direct cost type, but appears sparse and not the full direct cost line.

variables.notes: Selected the direct cost total because it best represents full cost of sales across years; using components would risk undercoverage.

candidates.why: Clear overhead/administrative expense line above operating profit; strong SG&A component.
Overhead personnel expense component within operating costs; suitable SG&A component.
Employee-related overhead, but may overlap with Personnel Costs in some years; still a reasonable SG&A component for different reporting years.
Explicit SG&A row exists, but appears unpopulated in preview while other component rows are populated; rules prefer explicit SG&A only if populated.
Direct cost of development activities, not SG&A.
Could be project/property related rather than corporate overhead; weak SG&A fit.
Revenue, not SG&A.

variables.notes: No populated explicit SG&A row is visible. Selected overhead components above operating profit and excluded balancing/total rows and depreciation. Did not include Selling, General & Administrative Expenses because it appears blank in the preview and component rows are available.

candidates.why: Only candidate with development wording, but it does not clearly indicate research and development expense and appears below financial items/non-operating area.
This is direct project/development property cost, not R&D.
Revenue, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated research/development expense line is identifiable. 'Redevelopment costs' does not clearly represent R&D and should not be used.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Most direct recurring interest expense line; preferred over broader financial expenses total.

candidates.row_label: Interest cost on right of use (leasehold)
candidates.why: Recurring lease interest cost; should be included as financing cost component alongside interest expense.
Recurring finance cost component and more granular than total financial expenses; include if using components.
Broader total finance expense, but would double count if combined with granular interest/other finance components.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental restatement of lease interest; likely duplicates Interest cost on right of use (leasehold).

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest cost on right of use (leasehold)

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance cost components and excluded total Financial expenses to avoid double counting. Excluded supplemental lease interest line because it appears duplicative of Interest cost on right of use (leasehold).

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to Parents shareholders
candidates.why: Best book equity line because it captures parent shareholders' equity and excludes non-controlling interests.
Usable only if no parent-only equity line exists; here it would risk overlap with minority interest.
Income allocation row, not balance-sheet equity.
Income allocation row, not balance-sheet equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to Parents shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent-only equity line to keep BE exclusive of minority interests.

candidates.why: Standard balance-sheet minority interest / NCI line.
Equivalent minority interest line; useful fallback if label changes across years.
Income attribution line, not balance-sheet equity NCI.
Income statement attribution total, not balance-sheet NCI.

variables.notes: Selected balance-sheet NCI labels as priority alternatives for minority interest.
